FORTIFIED Roof Certification

Official FORTIFIED evaluations for superior weather resilience

sendSubmit an Assignment
1,200+
Cases Completed
72 Hours
Response Time
100%
Success Rate
All Coastal States
Coverage Area

Overview

Trinity Engineering provides official FORTIFIED Home™ certification services through our team of designated FORTIFIED evaluators. We conduct comprehensive inspections during construction and post-construction to verify compliance with FORTIFIED standards, helping property owners achieve enhanced resilience against hurricanes, high winds, and hail while potentially reducing insurance premiums.

Request This Servicearrow_forward

Report Types Available

FORTIFIED Roof™ Certification

Official designation for roof system meeting FORTIFIED Roof standards.

schedule10-14 Business Days

FORTIFIED Home™ Certification

Comprehensive whole-house FORTIFIED designation with sealed deck, ring-shank nails, and more.

schedule14-21 Business Days

Retrofit Evaluation

Assessment of existing home with recommendations for achieving FORTIFIED designation.

schedule5-7 Business Days

Services & Solutions

Comprehensive capabilities delivered by licensed Professional Engineers

shield

FORTIFIED Roof™

Official certification for roof system that meets FORTIFIED standards for wind uplift resistance.

home

FORTIFIED Home™

Comprehensive whole-house FORTIFIED certification including roof, walls, and building envelope.

verified

New Construction Review

Multi-stage inspections during construction to ensure FORTIFIED compliance at each critical phase.

assignment_turned_in

Existing Home Evaluation

Assessment of existing properties for FORTIFIED designation or retrofit recommendations.

wind_power

Wind Uplift Testing

Engineering analysis and testing to verify roof system resistance to high wind forces.

savings

Insurance Premium Reduction

Documentation to support insurance premium discounts for FORTIFIED certified properties.

Our forensic engineers investigate a comprehensive range of failure mechanisms and causes

design_services
1

Pre-Construction Consultation

Review of architectural plans and roofing specifications for FORTIFIED compliance.

engineering
2

Mid-Roof Inspection

Critical on-site inspection during roof deck installation to verify sealed deck requirement.

task
3

Final Inspection

Comprehensive inspection of completed roof system including all FORTIFIED requirements.

workspace_premium

Official Certification

Submission to IBHS and issuance of official FORTIFIED designation certificate.
